     the Fermi energy is     2.6580 ev

!    total energy              =   -8183.80020054 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          3.0E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.27396080 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -8183.52623975 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -201950.43104583 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  101864.57358977 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -3151.76817694 Ry
     ewald contribution        =   95056.04053106 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.94113781 Ry

     total magnetization       =    33.38 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    36.40 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  51 iterations

     negative rho (up, down):  1.497E-03 1.318E-03
